column2: Test Case - Assessing Risks for Operations Near Industrial Sites
column3: ['Plan an operation near an industrial site. ', 'Assess risks associated with operations near industrial sites or activities such as live firing, gas venting, high-intensity radio transmissions. ']
column4: ['The system correctly identifies the location of the planned operation as being near an industrial site. ', 'The system manages identified risks based on the assessment (e.  , providing warnings, adjusting operation parameters). ']
